name: GEE Group Inc.
summary: GEE Group Inc. is a provider of human resources solutions, primarily offering temporary and permanent staffing in professional services sectors across the United States. Through subsidiaries including SNI Companies, Access Data Consulting, Agile Resources, Paladin Consulting, and others, the company serves IT, engineering, accounting and finance, office support, and healthcare verticals. It operates via four virtual and 19 branch office locations near major U.S. cities, serving clients from small businesses to Fortune 1000 companies.

products.name: Contract Staffing Services
products.description: Temporary placement of professionals in IT, engineering, accounting, finance, healthcare, and office support verticals.

products.name: Direct Hire Placement Services
products.description: Permanent placement of specialized professionals across IT, engineering, accounting, and other professional verticals.

products.name: Medical Scribe Services
products.description: Highly trained medical scribes for EMR services in emergency rooms and physician practices, provided by Scribe Solutions.

products.name: RPO/MSP/VMS Staffing Solutions
products.description: Staffing solutions through recruitment process outsourcing, managed service provider, and vendor management system arrangements.

products.name: AI-Focused IT Consulting and Staffing
products.description: Talent delivery for AI-driven application architecture, digital transformation, and enterprise operations optimization via Agile Resources.

products.name: Retained Search Services
products.description: Executive and specialized retained search services offered through SNI Companies brands.
